name: Real Golf Studio
address: 17165 Von Karman Ave Ste 101, Irvine, CA 92614
about: Real Golf Studio is a private indoor golf facility offering state-of-the-art spaces for practice, lessons, and club fitting. It operates on a non-membership system, allowing anyone to book time by reservation. The venue caters to both individual golfers seeking private practice and coaches requiring a dedicated space for instruction, featuring top-tier technology and professional-grade equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman launch monitors for detailed swing and ball data analysis
Dedicated private spaces free from weather distractions, ideal for focused practice
AR Putting Simulator and TOUR PUTT technology for comprehensive short game training
Option for scientific club fitting services with custom build and repair options

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site
No mention of alcohol services available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: World-renowned launch monitor for club and ball data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use rentals if available; custom club fitting and repair services are also offered on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services being available, so bringing your own may be necessary.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to complete 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and group size; booking a specific time slot is recommended.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue caters to juniors and youth with professional golf coaching programs available for kids and beginners.
